root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR mainly ports lock-table unit tests from MySQL and conditionally skips a test when the race detector is enabled (`c.Skip("skip race test")`). The case data does not include a concrete intermittent failure signature or a targeted stabilization fix beyond skipping/quarantine, so keep a conservative fallback classification rather than guessing a specific concurrency root cause.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).
